steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks what changed when Don Mateo became a patron. The passage states directly that he ‘ceased to write plays and assumed instead the nobler rôle of patron.’

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — He moved to a town outside of Madrid.: introduces information not stated in the passage. ✗
  • Choice B — He stopped writing plays.: matches the passage exactly — he stopped writing plays. ✓
  • Choice C — He achieved public recognition for a short story he had written earlier.: contradicts or goes beyond what the passage says. ✗
  • Choice D — He accepted a new job as a journalist.: introduces information not mentioned in the passage. ✗
That is the correct answer.
